HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

40class Gaussian : public IncidentField {
41 public:
42 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
43 // Construction
44 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
54 Gaussian(double wavelength, double waist, rvec focal_point,
55 double epsilonMedium, rvec propagationdirection, cvec polarisation);
56
57 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
58 // Pointwise evaluation
59 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
65 cvec EvaluateE(rvec r);
66
72 cvec EvaluateH(rvec r);
73
80 std::vector<cvec> EvaluateLayeredEandH(rvec r);
81
82 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
83 // RWG‑weighted integrals (RHS contributions)
84 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
92 dcmplx IntegrateE(RWGFun* f);
93
101 dcmplx IntegrateH(RWGFun* f);
102
109 std::vector<dcmplx> IntegrateLayeredEandH(RWGFun* f);
110
111 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
112 // Accessors
113 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
117 double Waist() const;
118
122 cvec Polarisation() const;
123
127 rvec Propagation() const;
128
129 private:
130 // --- Derived/physical parameters ---
131 double k;
132 rvec prop;
133 cvec p;
134 double w0;
135 double depth;
136 rvec focus;
137 double z;
138
139 GaussQuad<Gaussian> gauss;
140
141 // --- IncidentField type tags ---
145 bool IsPlaneWave() { return false; }
146
150 bool IsDipole() { return false; }
151
155 bool IsGaussian() { return true; }
156
157 // --- Layered GF wiring (unsupported for this class) ---
164 virtual void setGrnFunLayered(GreenF *fGrnFields, std::vector<Grid> tabGrids);
165};
166
167#endif
